source: manual seed + Epic UE 5.7 Material Expressions docs expansion + audit fixes (LinearInterpolate dedup, SamplerType enum, ReflectionVectorWS pins, etc.)

Custom.description: Inline HLSL escape hatch. User-defined input pins and one output (type configurable). Use sparingly — bypasses UE's optimizer and shader graph reasoning.
Custom.pinInfo: Inputs are entirely user-defined. For each entry in params.Inputs (e.g. [{"InputName":"UV"},{"InputName":"Mask"}]) the node exposes one input pin with that exact name. The primary output is named "Output" by default but can be overridden by params.Description text — keep it as "Output" unless you have reason to change. UE 5 supports additional outputs via params.AdditionalOutputs (each entry creates a pin with the given OutputName). The Code param holds the HLSL body and MUST end with a 'return' statement whose value matches OutputType (verified against viewer/tests/fixtures/ue-custom-node.t3d, where Code is 'return float3(...);'). Example for a simple 2x UV scale: params.Code = 'return UV * 2.0;', params.Inputs = [{"InputName":"UV"}], params.OutputType = 'CMOT_Float2'.

Multiply.description: Multiplies two values component-wise. Unconnected pins use ConstA/ConstB.

TextureSampleParameter2D.description: Samples a 2D texture exposed as a Material Parameter.

TextureCoordinate.description: Outputs the UV coordinates of the surface.

ScalarParameter.description: A scalar value exposed as a Material Parameter.

BlendAngleCorrectedNormals.description: Blends two tangent-space normals while preserving angle.

Constant.description: Outputs a single constant float value.

Constant4Vector.description: Outputs a four-channel RGBA constant vector.

DistanceCullFade.description: Outputs a scalar fade value for primitives affected by cull distance.

ParticleColor.description: Outputs the current particle color data.

ParticleDirection.description: Outputs the current particle direction vector.

ParticleMotionBlurFade.description: Outputs the particle motion blur fade amount.

ParticleRadius.description: Outputs the radius of the current particle.

ParticleRelativeTime.description: Outputs the relative lifetime of the current particle.

ParticleSize.description: Outputs the particle size as a two-channel vector.

ParticleSpeed.description: Outputs the speed of the current particle.

PerInstanceFadeAmount.description: Outputs the per-instance fade amount for instanced meshes.

PerInstanceRandom.description: Outputs a random value stable per instanced mesh instance.

Time.description: Outputs elapsed time for time-dependent material animation.

TwoSidedSign.description: Outputs 1 for front-facing surfaces and -1 for back-facing surfaces.

PrecomputedAOMask.description: Outputs the Lightmass precomputed ambient occlusion mask.

ActorPositionWS.description: Outputs the actor position in world space.

CameraPositionWS.description: Outputs the camera position in world space.

ObjectOrientation.description: Outputs the object orientation in world space.

ObjectPositionWS.description: Outputs the object bounds center in world space.

ParticlePositionWS.description: Outputs particle position in world space.

PixelNormalWS.description: Outputs the pixel normal in world space.

Rotator.description: Rotates UV coordinates around a configurable center.

ScreenPosition.description: Outputs screen-space position for the current pixel.

VertexNormalWS.description: Outputs vertex normals in world space.

VertexTangentWS.description: Outputs vertex tangents in world space.

ViewSize.description: Outputs the viewport size in pixels.

WorldPosition.description: Outputs the current pixel position in world space.

AtmosphericFogColor.description: Outputs atmospheric fog color for the current pixel. (deprecated in UE5; Atmospheric Fog actor was removed)

Desaturation.description: Desaturates an input color by a configurable fraction.

DepthFade.description: Fades opacity near intersections using scene depth.

PixelDepth.description: Outputs the depth of the current pixel.

SceneDepth.description: Samples scene depth at the provided UV coordinates.

Abs.description: Returns the absolute value of the input.

AppendVector.description: Appends channels from A and B into a wider vector.

Arccosine.description: Returns the inverse cosine of the input.

ArccosineFast.description: Returns a faster approximate inverse cosine of the input.

Arcsine.description: Returns the inverse sine of the input.

ArcsineFast.description: Returns a faster approximate inverse sine of the input.

Arctangent.description: Returns the inverse tangent of the input.

ArctangentFast.description: Returns a faster approximate inverse tangent of the input.

Arctangent2.description: Returns the inverse tangent of X/Y using signs to determine the quadrant.

Arctangent2Fast.description: Returns a faster approximate Arctangent2 result.

Ceil.description: Rounds the input up to the next whole number.

Clamp.description: Constrains input values to a minimum and maximum range.

ComponentMask.description: Masks selected RGBA channels from the input.

Cosine.description: Outputs a repeating cosine wave over the input range.

CrossProduct.description: Returns the cross product of two three-channel vectors.

DotProduct.description: Returns the dot product of two vectors.

Floor.description: Rounds the input down to the previous whole number.

Fmod.description: Returns the floating-point remainder of A divided by B.

Frac.description: Returns the fractional part of the input.

If.description: Compares A and B and selects the matching branch input.

Logarithm10.description: Returns the base-10 logarithm of the input.

Logarithm2.description: Returns the base-2 logarithm of the input.

Max.description: Returns the higher of A and B component-wise.

Min.description: Returns the lower of A and B component-wise.

Power.description: Raises Base to the power of Exp.

Round.description: Rounds the input to the nearest whole number.

Step.description: Returns 0 or 1 depending on whether X is above the reference value Y.

SmoothStep.description: Smoothly interpolates between 0 and 1 using Min, Max, and Value.

Sign.description: Returns -1, 0, or 1 according to the sign of the input.

Sine.description: Outputs a repeating sine wave over the input range.

SquareRoot.description: Outputs the square root of the input.

Tangent.description: Outputs the tangent of the input.

Truncate.description: Discards the fractional part of the input.

StaticBool.description: Provides a compile-time boolean value for material function logic.

StaticSwitch.description: Selects between A and B according to a static boolean value.

TextureObject.description: Outputs a texture object for use by material functions or texture samples.

MakeMaterialAttributes.description: Bundles standard material attributes into a single MaterialAttributes output.

SetMaterialAttributes.description: Sets selected material attributes on an incoming MaterialAttributes value.
SetMaterialAttributes.pinInfo: The node shows one input pin per attribute listed in params.AttributeNames plus the fixed "MaterialAttributes" input. Pin names match UE material attribute names exactly (e.g., "BaseColor", "Metallic", "Roughness", "Normal", "EmissiveColor"). Output is always "MaterialAttributes".

BreakMaterialAttributes.description: Breaks a MaterialAttributes input into standard attribute outputs.

GetMaterialAttributes.description: Extracts selected outputs from a MaterialAttributes input.
GetMaterialAttributes.pinInfo: The node exposes one output pin per attribute listed in params.AttributeNames. Pin names match UE material attribute names exactly (e.g., "BaseColor", "Metallic", "Roughness", "Normal", "EmissiveColor"). The single input is always "MaterialAttributes".

BlendMaterialAttributes.description: Blends two MaterialAttributes inputs according to Alpha.

CollectionParameter.description: References a scalar or vector value from a Material Parameter Collection.

DynamicParameter.description: Outputs up to four per-particle dynamic parameter values.

FontSampleParameter.description: Samples a font texture exposed as a parameter.

StaticSwitchParameter.description: Static parameter that selects A or B at compile time.

StaticBoolParameter.description: Static bool parameter for material functions and compile-time decisions.

VectorParameter.description: Four-channel vector parameter editable in material instances.

TextureObjectParameter.description: Texture object parameter for material functions or texture samples.

TextureSample.description: Samples a texture using optional UV coordinates.

TextureSampleParameterSubUV.description: Particle SubUV texture sample exposed as a parameter.

TextureSampleParameterCube.description: Samples a cubemap texture exposed as a parameter.

ParticleMacroUV.description: Outputs macro UV coordinates for particles.

SphericalParticleOpacity.description: Computes particle opacity for spherical particle rendering.

LandscapeLayerBlend.description: Blends multiple landscape layer inputs into one result.
LandscapeLayerBlend.pinInfo: For each entry in params.Layers, the node exposes two input pins: "Layer <LayerName>" (any float) and "Height <LayerName>" (Float1). The single output is "Result". Use the exact layer name with capital L and H and a space before the name.

LandscapeLayerCoords.description: Generates UV coordinates for landscape material mapping.

LandscapeLayerSwitch.description: Selects between layer-used and layer-not-used inputs for landscape optimization.

LandscapeLayerWeight.description: Blends Base and Layer according to a named landscape layer weight.

LandscapeVisibilityMask.description: Outputs the landscape visibility mask value.

NamedRerouteDeclaration.description: Declares a named reroute value. UE displays the default node title as Name and linked usage nodes can read the captured input without visible wires.
NamedRerouteDeclaration.pinInfo: This is UE's Named Reroute Declaration node. Wire the captured value into Input, set params.Name to the visible reroute name, and pair it with one or more NamedRerouteUsage nodes that reference the declaration by UE's Declaration/DeclarationGuid fields.

NamedRerouteUsage.description: Uses a Named Reroute Declaration value elsewhere in the material graph.
NamedRerouteUsage.pinInfo: This node has no visible input pins. UE links it to a NamedRerouteDeclaration through Declaration and DeclarationGuid object fields; see viewer/tests/fixtures/ue-named-reroute.t3d for the real clipboard format.

AntialiasedTextureMask.description: Samples a texture channel as an anti-aliased threshold mask.

BumpOffset.description: Offsets UV coordinates using a height input for parallax mapping.

ConstantBiasScale.description: Adds a bias to the input and multiplies by a scale.

DDX.description: Outputs the screen-space DDX derivative of the input.

DDY.description: Outputs the screen-space DDY derivative of the input.

Distance.description: Computes Euclidean distance between A and B.

DistanceFieldGradient.description: Outputs the mesh distance field gradient direction at Position.

DistanceToNearestSurface.description: Outputs distance from Position to the nearest mesh distance field surface.

FeatureLevelSwitch.description: Selects an input based on the active rendering feature level.

Fresnel.description: Computes a view-angle based Fresnel falloff.

GIReplace.description: Chooses different inputs for default, static indirect, or dynamic indirect GI paths.

LightmassReplace.description: Uses one input for realtime rendering and another for Lightmass export.

PreviousFrameSwitch.description: Selects current or previous-frame values for motion-vector aware materials.

QualitySwitch.description: Selects an input based on material quality level.

RotateAboutAxis.description: Outputs the delta from rotating Position around an axis and pivot.

SphereMask.description: Outputs a soft spherical mask from positions A and B.

DeriveNormalZ.description: Derives a Z component for a tangent-space normal from XY.

Transform.description: Transforms a vector between material coordinate spaces.

TransformPosition.description: Transforms a position between material coordinate spaces.

CameraVectorWS.description: Outputs the camera vector in world space.

LightVector.description: Outputs the light vector for supported light function/deferred decal contexts.

ObjectBounds.description: Outputs the object bounds as a three-channel vector.

ReflectionVectorWS.description: Outputs the reflection vector in world space.

MapARPassthroughCameraUV.description: Map AR Passthrough Camera UVs (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

MeshPaintTextureReplace.description: Mesh Paint Texture Replace (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

PathTracingBufferTexture.description: 辐亮度（路径追踪） (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

ReflectionCapturePassSwitch.description: Reflection Capture Pass Switch (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

RuntimeVirtualTextureSample.description: Runtime Virtual Texture Sample (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SceneDepthWithoutWater.description: Scene Depth Without Water (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

TextureObjectFromCollection.description: Texture Object From Collection (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

MotionVectorWorldOffsetOutput.description: Motion Vector World Offset (Per-Pixel) (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

LandscapePhysicalMaterialOutput.description: Landscape Physical Material Output (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

AbsorptionMediumMaterialOutput.description: Absorption Medium (Path Tracer Only) (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

RuntimeVirtualTextureOutput.description: Runtime Virtual Texture Output (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SingleLayerWaterMaterialOutput.description: Single Layer Water Material (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubsurfaceMediumMaterialOutput.description: Subsurface Medium (Path Tracer Only) (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

VolumetricCloudEmptySpaceSkippingOutput.description: Volumetric Cloud Empty Space Skipping Output <Experimental> (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

AtmosphericLightColor.description: Atmosphere Sun Light Illuminance On Ground (not per pixel) (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

AtmosphericLightVector.description: Atmosphere Sun Light Vector (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

MeshPaintTextureCoordinateIndex.description: Mesh Paint Texture Coordinate Index (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

MeshPaintTextureObject.description: Mesh Paint Texture Object (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SkyLightEnvMapSample.description: Sky Light Env Map Sample (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

VolumetricCloudEmptySpaceSkippingInput.description: Volumetric Cloud Empty Space Skipping Input <Experimental> (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

RuntimeVirtualTextureSampleParameter.description: Runtime Virtual Texture Sample Param  (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SparseVolumeTextureSample.description: Sparse Volume Texture Sample (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubstrateSlabBSDF.description: Substrate Slab BSDF - Simple (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubstrateSimpleClearCoatBSDF.description: Substrate Simple Clear Coat (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubstrateSingleLayerWaterBSDF.description: Substrate Single Layer Water BSDF (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubstrateConvertToDecal.description: Substrate Convert To Decal (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SubstrateConvertMaterialAttributes.description: Substrate Convert Material Attributes (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).

SparseVolumeTextureSampleParameter.description: Sparse Volume Texture Sample Param  (auto-discovered; verify pins/types).
